page.title: Compare
page.description: Compare geographic outputs from different runs or external sources on synchronized maps.

entry.noMatch: This lens could not be matched to a stored output

toast.unknownSource: A shared source could not be found and was removed from the link
toast.invalidLink: The comparison link contained an invalid source reference

basket.title: Sources
basket.setActive: Click to compare as source B

picker.title: Add comparison source
picker.recentRunsLimit: Showing the most recent runs only
picker.empty: No runs with stored geographic outputs yet. Run a forecast with a GRIB sink, or add external data below.

wmsUrl.title: External WMS server
wmsUrl.description: Any WMS endpoint — another FIAB instance, GeoServer, a met-service WMS. The server must allow cross-origin requests (CORS).
wmsUrl.errorUnreachable: Server not reachable — check the URL, and that it allows cross-origin (CORS) requests from this app
wmsUrl.errorHttp: The server responded with HTTP {{status}} — check the URL path and any token
wmsUrl.errorParse: The server responded, but not with a readable WMS capabilities document

hostPath.title: GRIB directory on this host
hostPath.description: A folder of GRIB files on the machine FIAB runs on — e.g. data generated by another system. A lens server is started on it directly.

lens.dirError: Could not resolve the output directory
lens.stopAllHint: Stops the lens servers behind the current sources. They are never stopped automatically.
lens.paused: Auto-start paused — start lenses per panel

panel.emptySlot: Pick a second source to compare
panel.pickPrompt: Click a source chip above, or add a new source
panel.corsHint: If this is an external server, it must send CORS headers

modes.flickerHint: Click the map or press Space to flip between A and B

timeline.label: Valid time
timeline.trackHint: Click to jump to a time step

link.autoUnlinked: The two sources share no common layers — selection is per panel.

browser.bothHint: Only layers available in both sources

sidebar.empty: Add layers from the browser on the right.

export.title: Export comparison
export.description: Download the current view as PNG, or open a print-ready report for PDF.
export.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional notes shown on the report…
export.failed: Could not capture the map view
export.popupBlocked: The report window was blocked — allow pop-ups for this site

overlays.title: Context overlays
overlays.invalid: Could not read that file as GeoJSON
